branding.name: Figma
branding.voice: confident, editorial, technical with joyful interludes
branding.personality: A rigorous monochrome editorial frame that repeatedly drops into oversized pastel color blocks — reads like a designer placing sticky notes on a clean desk. Technical and serious about craft, but not afraid of color.
branding.targetAudience: Designers, product teams, and developers evaluating or implementing Figma's marketing design language

principles: Token binding — every color, type, spacing, and radius value is a named token, never hardcoded
Monochrome core with pastel accent blocks — black-and-white chrome makes color blocks feel intentional
Pill is the only button shape — no square CTAs anywhere in the system
Weight-based hierarchy — body hierarchy comes from figmaSans variable weight, not opacity or mid-gray text
Negative letter-spacing scales with display size — tight tracking on headlines, near-zero on body
Color blocks as depth device — saturated background panels substitute for traditional elevation and shadow
Generous section rhythm — 96px vertical gap between major sections, white canvas separates every colored panel
visualConcepts: Monochrome canvas — pure white surfaces, pure black ink, black-and-white CTAs
Oversized pastel color-block sections — lime, lavender, cream, mint, pink, coral, navy
Sticky-note aesthetic — color blocks read as giant sticky notes placed on a clean desk
Editorial typography — tight line-heights on display, generous on body, fine weight increments
Pill-shaped CTAs — every call-to-action is a rounded pill (50px radius)
Mono taxonomy — figmaMono reserved for eyebrows, captions, and category labels only
designLanguage.layoutPhilosophy: Max content width ~1280px with generous gutters. Color blocks break the column grid to span full width with rounded corners. White canvas breathing room between every colored panel. Three- and four-column grids for pricing and template galleries. Asymmetric layouts inside color blocks — single editorial column of headline + body with generous side margins.
designLanguage.spacingPhilosophy: 8px base unit. Generous and rhythmic. Section-to-section gap is 96px. Color-block interior padding is 48px. Card interior padding is 24px. Buttons use 8px vertical / 20-24px horizontal padding. Form inputs use 12px vertical / 14px horizontal.
designLanguage.typographyHierarchy: One variable typeface (figmaSans) at fine weight increments (320, 330, 340, 480, 540, 700) carries hierarchy through weight rather than size. figmaMono reserved for uppercase section eyebrows and captions with positive letter-spacing. Display sizes (86px, 64px) use tight line-heights (1.00-1.10) and aggressive negative tracking. Body copy stays at 18px with generous line-height (1.45) and near-zero letter-spacing.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Full-width hero with oversized headline (80-86px), lead body paragraph, and paired CTA buttons (primary black pill + secondary white pill)
sections.visualNotes: White canvas hero with 86px display-xl headline at weight 340 with -1.72px letter-spacing. Two pill CTAs: 'Get started for free' (black fill) and 'Contact sales' (white fill with hairline border). Large side margins create generous whitespace.

sections.name: Color Palette
sections.description: Full color system documentation showing every token swatch with hex value and usage role
sections.visualNotes: Organized in groups: Brand & Accent (black, white, magenta), Surface (canvas, inverse-canvas, surface-soft, hairline, 7 color blocks), Text (ink, inverse-ink), Semantic (success green). Each swatch shows color preview, name, hex, and role description.

sections.name: Typography Scale
sections.description: Full type scale with 12 roles from display-xl down to caption, each showing sample text and token metadata
sections.visualNotes: Displayed on surface-soft background. Each type role shown as a row with token metadata (size, weight, line-height, letter-spacing, font family) alongside a sample text. Key roles: display-xl (86px), display-lg (64px), headline (26px), subhead (26px), card-title (24px), body-lg (20px), body (18px), body-sm (16px), link, button, eyebrow (mono), caption (mono).

sections.name: Button Variants
sections.description: All button component variants: primary, secondary, tertiary text, icon circle, magenta promo, and pricing tab toggles
sections.visualNotes: Shows all 6 button variants plus pricing tab (default and selected) in a card grid. Each variant shown with both light and dark (navy) background where applicable. All CTAs are pills (50px radius); icon buttons are circles (9999px radius). Black primary pill is the signature CTA.

sections.name: Color Blocks
sections.description: The signature pastel color-block sections showing all 7 variants: lime, lilac, cream, mint, pink, coral, and navy
sections.visualNotes: Each block shown at full width with 24px rounded corners, 48px interior padding, and a headline + body + CTA composition. Navy block uses inverse white text. Blocks represent the core narrative device of the Figma marketing system.

sections.name: Cards & Pricing
sections.description: Pricing tier cards, template cards, and feature illustration tiles
sections.visualNotes: Pricing cards use 24px rounded corners with hairline border (no shadow). Template cards use 8px rounded corners on surface-soft background. Each card shows tier name, price, feature list, and CTA.

sections.name: Forms & Inputs
sections.description: Form fields, labels, text inputs, and textareas shown with focused and default states
sections.visualNotes: Form inputs use 8px rounded corners, 1px hairline border, 12px vertical / 14px horizontal padding, and 18px body type. Focused state uses black ring. Eye label uses figmaMono uppercase. Promo banner in lilac with magenta CTA sits above the form.

sections.name: Marquee Strip
sections.description: Thin black ribbon with scrolling customer logos in white
sections.visualNotes: 36px tall black strip with white text in figmaMono uppercase. Full width, minimal height — reads as a brand signal banner directly under navigation.

sections.name: Spacing, Radius & Elevation
sections.description: Visual documentation of the spacing scale, border radius stops, and elevation levels
sections.visualNotes: Spacing scale from hair (1px) to section (96px) shown as horizontal bars. Radius scale from xs (2px) to full (9999px) shown as colored squares. Elevation levels 0-3 shown as cards on surface-soft background with box-shadow treatments. All values traceable to DESIGN.md tokens.

sections.name: Responsive Behavior
sections.description: Breakpoint table showing 7 device widths from 4K (1920px) to mobile XS (559px)
sections.visualNotes: Table of breakpoints with key changes per viewport. Device ladder visualization showing relative widths. Key changes: pricing collapses 4-up to 2-up at 960px, display-xl reduces from 86px to ~48px on mobile, color blocks become full-bleed below 768px.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Dense link grid on white canvas with 4-column layout and brand wordmark
sections.visualNotes: White canvas footer with 4-column grid of link lists. figmaMono column headings. Large top/bottom padding (96px section spacing). Hairline-soft border between columns.

Button.behavior: All CTAs are pill-shaped (50px radius). Primary is black fill with white text. Secondary is white fill with black text and hairline border. Tertiary is text-only with transparent background. Icon buttons are 40px circles. Magenta promo is a reserved accent for limited use. Pricing tabs toggle between default white and selected black surfaces.

Text.note: Eyebrow and caption use figmaMono uppercase with positive tracking. Body hierarchy via weight not opacity.

properties.note: Navy variant uses inverse white text. All others use black ink.

properties.default: white background, black text, pill shape
properties.selected: black background, white text, pill shape

visual.colorStory: A deliberate contrast between rigorous monochrome (pure black on pure white) and oversized pastel color blocks. The black-and-white chrome — nav, buttons, body type, footer — establishes an editorial, technical credibility. Then each story section drops into a saturated lime, lavender, cream, mint, pink, coral, or navy panel that reads as a sticky note on a clean desk. The result is both serious and joyful. Magenta is the only accent color, used scarcely for promotional CTAs.

typography.fallback: Inter for sans, JetBrains Mono for mono

radius.character: pill-shaped CTAs (50px), rounded cards (24px), sharp forms (8px), circular icons (9999px)

motion.character: Not explicitly documented in the static analysis. Template cards use lazy-load fade-in on scroll. Color blocks appear to render statically. Animations exist on the marquee strip but are not detailed.
